niceToHave.title: CHANGELOG.md `[0.1.0]` retro-entry is reconstructed, not historical
niceToHave.why: The retro-added `[0.1.0] — 2026-05-12 / Initial scaffold (sprint cleanup-2026-05-12, agent C)` entry is plausible (the 5 sub-dirs existed pre-cull, version was 0.1.0) but no prior CHANGELOG existed in the package to attest to the exact date or sprint label. Per UFR-013, retro-attribution should ideally be flagged as reconstructed (e.g. `(retro-added 2026-05-16 from git log)`) rather than presented as if authored in 2026-05-12. Minor honesty hygiene.
niceToHave.fix: Optional: append `(reconstructed 2026-05-16 from package state)` to the `[0.1.0]` heading, OR leave as-is — the date is verifiable via `git log -- packages/musaium-shared/` and the spec already establishes the chronological context.

verifications.scopeBoundary: PASS — git diff --stat HEAD scoped to packages/musaium-shared/ + museum-frontend/package-lock.json returns exactly 35 files: 16 dist deletions (auth/errors/geo/i18n/validation sub-dirs entirely + dist/index.{js,d.ts} modified), 11 src deletions (5 sub-dirs entirely), 2 modifications (src/index.ts, package.json), 1 untracked (CHANGELOG.md), 1 lockfile modification (museum-frontend/package-lock.json). Lockfile diff = exactly 2 lines (version 0.1.0→0.2.0 for ../packages/musaium-shared) — no unrelated dep bumps. NO other apps touched (BE/Web package-lock not in diff scope per spec).
verifications.antiHallucination: PASS — opened all 3 modified files verbatim: (a) src/index.ts = `export * from './observability';` single line (matches spec § Design line 83); (b) package.json version=0.2.0 (matches spec § Tasks T1.5.b), exports = `.` + `./observability` only (matches spec § Design line 85), description = `Cross-app sentry scrubber + observability primitives — consumed by museum-backend, museum-web, and museum-frontend.` (matches spec § Design line 87 verbatim); (c) CHANGELOG.md `[0.2.0] — 2026-05-16` heading present, Removed/Kept/Changed sections present with sub-export names and consumer paths verifiable. Re-ran the 5 phantom path-style greps (`from '@musaium/shared/<sub>'` for geo/auth/errors/i18n/validation) = 0 hit ; re-ran the 9 named-symbol greps from spec § T1.5.a (haversineDistanceMeters/decodeJwtPayloadWith/jwtHeaderSchema/baseJwtPayloadSchema/Base64UrlDecoder/ERROR_CODES/PASSWORD_MIN/PASSWORD_MAX/passwordSchema) cross-app from `@musaium/shared` = 0 hit each. Total live consumption surface confirmed = 12 lines across 3 files, 100% observability — matches spec § Vérifications préalables line 51 verbatim.
verifications.specCompliance:
- AC § 5 sub-dirs deleted: MET (`ls packages/musaium-shared/src/` returns ONLY `index.ts observability/`)
- AC src/index.ts reduced to observability re-export: MET (single line, verbatim spec § Design 83)
- AC package.json version bump 0.1.0 → 0.2.0: MET (recommandation spec § Open Question Q2 selected)
- AC package.json exports trimmed: MET (only `.` + `./observability`, 5 phantom entries removed)
- AC package.json description updated: MET (verbatim match spec § Design 87)
- AC dist artifacts cleaned: MET (5 dist sub-dirs deleted; remaining dist/ = `index.js index.d.ts observability/` — clean tsc output)
- AC observability LIVE preserved: MET (dist/observability/ intact with `index.{js,d.ts} sentry-scrubber.{js,d.ts}`)
- AC CHANGELOG entry: MET (file created with `## [0.2.0] — 2026-05-16` + Removed/Kept/Changed sections per spec T1.5.f convention)
- AC sentinels: PASS — as-any-ratchet.mjs = `PASS — backend=0<=0 frontend=0<=0 web=0<=0` (re-run verbatim); workspace-links.mjs exit 0 (re-run verbatim, all 3 apps link healthy)
- AC 3 apps `file:` deps unchanged: MET (BE/FE/Web package.json all still `file:../packages/musaium-shared`)
- AC no leftover phantom references in CI/scripts: PASS (grep across `.json|.ts|.mjs|.yml|.yaml|.md` excluding node_modules/.claude/docs/roadmap-night/docs/_archive returned 0 hit)
- AC scope boundary: PASS — lockfile diff exclusively the version bump (2-line change, no transitive dep movement)
verifications.uFRCompliance: UFR-016 bury_dead_code: STRICT respect — 5/5 sub-exports confirmed 0 consumer (path-style + named-symbol re-verified), all deleted without compatibility wrappers/purgatoire. UFR-018 check-configs-before-assuming: spec author re-verified consumption via grep before recommending cull, reviewer re-verified same greps independently (UFR-013). UFR-013 honesty: CHANGELOG claims are verifiable (consumer paths cited, sub-export names listed); only minor caveat is the retro-added `[0.1.0]` entry (N1). UFR-005 no-piling: cull selected over câblage (path b) — 30min effort vs 4h, no artificial imports manufactured. Gotcha CLAUDE.md `@musaium/shared file: dep`: respected — `pnpm bootstrap` ran (per dispatcher confirmation), lockfile reflects re-install, workspace-links sentinel green.

summary: T1.5 executes path (a) cull cleanly: 5 phantom sub-dirs (geo/auth/errors/i18n/validation) deleted from src/ + dist/, barrel reduced to single observability re-export, package.json version bumped 0.1.0 → 0.2.0 with exports map and description trimmed to observability-only, CHANGELOG.md created with factually verifiable Removed/Kept/Changed sections. Re-verified independently: 0 path-style hit + 0 named-symbol hit cross-app for all 5 phantom exports, 100% of live `@musaium/shared` consumption is observability (12 import lines, 3 files), sentinels green (as-any 0<=0 across 3 apps, workspace-links exit 0), 3 apps' `file:` deps unchanged, lockfile diff strictly the version bump. Approved. One nice-to-have only: the retro-added `[0.1.0]` CHANGELOG entry could be flagged as reconstructed per UFR-013 strict honesty.
